ksa_text: Knowledge of AI governance and regulatory compliance requirements, including the EU AI Act risk classification system, NIST AI RMF governance functions, organizational AI policy design, and conformity assessment procedures.

dcwf.top_element_label: Research the latest machine learning and AI tools, techniques, and best practices.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Research the latest machine learning and AI tools, techniques, and best practices.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-K-027 (AI, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4451 is insufficient to establish relevance to market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nist_ai_rmf=0.445, eu_ai_act=0.445, dcwf=0.418) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4451 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does AI-domain KSA AI-K-027 (composite 0.4451) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.4451 for AI domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act practitioner obligations; AI-adjacent competencies appear in senior analytics IC roles at awareness level only. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Market Research Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms AI domain KSA at composite 0.4451 is not a standard requirement for Market Research Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4451, domain AI, scope weak fit. High confidence.
